sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20468" key="botruoxai/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βοτρῠο-χαίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n20468.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with clustering hair,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
